narrative:
Adams Township has 1,562 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.1 percentage points.
